phase_title: Competition Release Final QA and Acceptance
activation_note: The human explicitly prioritized completion of the competition release and approved the repository-controlled COMP-QA-v1 final QA gate. Codex must execute only COMP-QA, verify and apply only the canonical one-chunk payload, run every exact validation, restore the two known Next-generated configuration files exactly to baseline after the successful web build, add only the final QA acceptance artifact, perform no migration, database mutation, external service access, deployment, or production operation, stop after Automation v2 Prepare, and must not activate or execute 10H-A or any successor.
